candidates.row_label: Cash flow from operating activities INVESTING ACTIVITIES
candidates.why: Despite the concatenated header text, the values align with net cash flow from operating activities; best available OANCF label.

candidates.row_label: Cash flow before interest and tax
candidates.why: Intermediate operating cash subtotal, not final operating cash flow.

candidates.row_label: Cash flow from changes in working capital
candidates.why: Component of operating cash flow, not OANCF total.

final_choice.row_label: Cash flow from operating activities INVESTING ACTIVITIES

variables.notes: Used the reported operating cash flow total; label appears concatenated with the next section header but is still clearly the operating cash-flow line.
